base.hirText:
Insert: (Insert a b c d) <-
      (InsertInput a b c d)

Remove: (Remove a b) <-
      (RemoveInput a b)

LaterChild: (LaterChild ParentCtr ParentN Ctr2 N2) <-
      (Insert Ctr1 N1 ParentCtr ParentN),
      (Insert Ctr2 N2 ParentCtr ParentN),
      (FILTER return (Ctr1 * 10 + N1) > (Ctr2 * 10 + N2);)

FirstChild: (FirstChild ParentCtr ParentN ChildCtr ChildN) <-
      (Insert ChildCtr ChildN ParentCtr ParentN),
      (NOT (LaterChild ParentCtr ParentN ChildCtr ChildN))

Sibling: (Sibling ChildCtr1 ChildN1 ChildCtr2 ChildN2) <-
      (Insert ChildCtr1 ChildN1 ParentCtr ParentN),
      (Insert ChildCtr2 ChildN2 ParentCtr ParentN)

LaterSibling: (LaterSibling Ctr1 N1 Ctr2 N2) <-
      (Sibling Ctr1 N1 Ctr2 N2),
      (FILTER return (Ctr1 * 10 + N1) > (Ctr2 * 10 + N2);)

LaterSibling2: (LaterSibling2 Ctr1 N1 Ctr3 N3) <-
      (Sibling Ctr1 N1 Ctr2 N2),
      (Sibling Ctr1 N1 Ctr3 N3),
      (FILTER return (Ctr1 * 10 + N1) > (Ctr2 * 10 + N2);),
      (FILTER return (Ctr2 * 10 + N2) > (Ctr3 * 10 + N3);)

NextSibling: (NextSibling Ctr1 N1 Ctr2 N2) <-
      (LaterSibling Ctr1 N1 Ctr2 N2),
      (NOT (LaterSibling2 Ctr1 N1 Ctr2 N2))

HasNextSibling: (HasNextSibling SibCtr1 SibN1) <-
      (LaterSibling SibCtr1 SibN1 _gen1 _gen2)

NotSiblingInsert: (NotSiblingInsert Ctr1 N1 Ctr2 N2) <-
      (Insert Ctr1 N1 Ctr2 N2),
      (NOT (HasNextSibling Ctr1 N1))

NextSiblingAnc1: (NextSiblingAnc StartCtr StartN NextCtr NextN) <-
      (NextSibling StartCtr StartN NextCtr NextN)

recursive.hirText:
NextSiblingAnc2: (NextSiblingAnc StartCtr StartN NextCtr NextN) <-
      (NextSiblingAnc ParentCtr ParentN NextCtr NextN),
      (NotSiblingInsert StartCtr StartN ParentCtr ParentN)

base.hirText:
HasChild: (HasChild ParentCtr ParentN) <-
      (Insert _gen3 _gen4 ParentCtr ParentN)

NextElem1: (NextElem PrevCtr PrevN NextCtr NextN) <-
      (FirstChild PrevCtr PrevN NextCtr NextN)

NextElem2: (NextElem PrevCtr PrevN NextCtr NextN) <-
      (NextSiblingAnc PrevCtr PrevN NextCtr NextN),
      (NOT (HasChild PrevCtr PrevN))

Assign: (Assign ctr n ctr n n) <-
      (Insert ctr n _gen5 _gen6)

CurrentValue: (CurrentValue ElemCtr ElemN Value) <-
      (Assign IDCtr IDN ElemCtr ElemN Value),
      (NOT (Remove IDCtr IDN))

HasValue: (HasValue ElemCtr ElemN) <-
      (CurrentValue ElemCtr ElemN _gen7)

NotHasValueNextElem: (NotHasValueNextElem Ctr1 N1 Ctr2 N2) <-
      (NextElem Ctr1 N1 Ctr2 N2),
      (NOT (HasValue Ctr2 N2))

SkipBlank1: (SkipBlank FromCtr FromN ToCtr ToN) <-
      (NextElem FromCtr FromN ToCtr ToN)

recursive.hirText:
SkipBlank2: (SkipBlank FromCtr FromN ToCtr ToN) <-
      (SkipBlank ViaCtr ViaN ToCtr ToN),
      (NotHasValueNextElem FromCtr FromN ViaCtr ViaN)

base.hirText:
NextVisible1: (NextVisible PrevCtr PrevN NextCtr NextN) <-
      (HasValue PrevCtr PrevN),
      (SkipBlank PrevCtr PrevN NextCtr NextN),
      (HasValue NextCtr NextN)

NextVisible2: (NextVisible PrevCtr PrevN NextCtr NextN) <-
      (HasValue PrevCtr PrevN),
      (SkipBlank PrevCtr PrevN NextCtr NextN),
      (HasValue NextCtr NextN)

Result: (Result ctr1 ctr2 value) <-
      (NextVisible ctr1 _gen8 ctr2 N2),
      (CurrentValue ctr2 N2 value)

hirSExpr:
(hir-program
(stratum 0 simple
  :members @["Insert", "Remove"]
  (base-variant :name Insert
  :var-order @["a", "b", "c", "d"]
  :clause-order @[0]
  :head (Insert(a, b, c, d))
  :body (InsertInput(a, b, c, d):@[0, 1, 2, 3])
)
  (base-variant :name Remove
  :var-order @["a", "b"]
  :clause-order @[0]
  :head (Remove(a, b))
  :body (RemoveInput(a, b):@[0, 1])
)
)
(stratum 1 simple
  :members @["LaterChild"]
  (base-variant :name LaterChild
  :var-order @["ParentCtr", "ParentN", "Ctr1", "N1", "Ctr2", "N2"]
  :clause-order @[0, 1, 2]
  :head (LaterChild(ParentCtr, ParentN, Ctr2, N2))
  :body (Insert(Ctr1, N1, ParentCtr, ParentN):@[2, 3, 0, 1] ⋈ Insert(Ctr2, N2, ParentCtr, ParentN):@[2, 3, 0, 1] ⋈ (filter((Ctr1, N1, Ctr2, N2)) {.cpp: "return (Ctr1 * 10 + N1) > (Ctr2 * 10 + N2);" .}))
)
)
(stratum 2 simple
  :members @["FirstChild", "Sibling"]
  (base-variant :name FirstChild
  :var-order @["ChildCtr", "ChildN", "ParentCtr", "ParentN"]
  :clause-order @[0, 1]
  :head (FirstChild(ParentCtr, ParentN, ChildCtr, ChildN))
  :body (Insert(ChildCtr, ChildN, ParentCtr, ParentN):@[0, 1, 2, 3] ⋈ ~LaterChild(ParentCtr, ParentN, ChildCtr, ChildN))
)
  (base-variant :name Sibling
  :var-order @["ParentCtr", "ParentN", "ChildCtr1", "ChildN1", "ChildCtr2", "ChildN2"]
  :clause-order @[0, 1]
  :head (Sibling(ChildCtr1, ChildN1, ChildCtr2, ChildN2))
  :body (Insert(ChildCtr1, ChildN1, ParentCtr, ParentN):@[2, 3, 0, 1] ⋈ Insert(ChildCtr2, ChildN2, ParentCtr, ParentN):@[2, 3, 0, 1])
)
)
(stratum 3 simple
  :members @["LaterSibling", "LaterSibling2"]
  (base-variant :name LaterSibling
  :var-order @["Ctr1", "N1", "Ctr2", "N2"]
  :clause-order @[0, 1]
  :head (LaterSibling(Ctr1, N1, Ctr2, N2))
  :body (Sibling(Ctr1, N1, Ctr2, N2):@[0, 1, 2, 3] ⋈ (filter((Ctr1, N1, Ctr2, N2)) {.cpp: "return (Ctr1 * 10 + N1) > (Ctr2 * 10 + N2);" .}))
)
  (base-variant :name LaterSibling2
  :var-order @["Ctr1", "N1", "Ctr2", "N2", "Ctr3", "N3"]
  :clause-order @[0, 2, 1, 3]
  :head (LaterSibling2(Ctr1, N1, Ctr3, N3))
  :body (Sibling(Ctr1, N1, Ctr2, N2):@[0, 1, 2, 3] ⋈ (filter((Ctr1, N1, Ctr2, N2)) {.cpp: "return (Ctr1 * 10 + N1) > (Ctr2 * 10 + N2);" .}) ⋈ Sibling(Ctr1, N1, Ctr3, N3):@[0, 1, 2, 3] ⋈ (filter((Ctr2, N2, Ctr3, N3)) {.cpp: "return (Ctr2 * 10 + N2) > (Ctr3 * 10 + N3);" .}))
)
)
(stratum 4 simple
  :members @["HasNextSibling", "NextSibling"]
  (base-variant :name NextSibling
  :var-order @["Ctr1", "N1", "Ctr2", "N2"]
  :clause-order @[0, 1]
  :head (NextSibling(Ctr1, N1, Ctr2, N2))
  :body (LaterSibling(Ctr1, N1, Ctr2, N2):@[0, 1, 2, 3] ⋈ ~LaterSibling2(Ctr1, N1, Ctr2, N2))
)
  (base-variant :name HasNextSibling
  :var-order @["SibCtr1", "SibN1", "_gen1", "_gen2"]
  :clause-order @[0]
  :head (HasNextSibling(SibCtr1, SibN1))
  :body (LaterSibling(SibCtr1, SibN1, _gen1, _gen2):@[0, 1, 2, 3])
)
)
(stratum 5 simple
  :members @["NotSiblingInsert"]
  (base-variant :name NotSiblingInsert
  :var-order @["Ctr1", "N1", "Ctr2", "N2"]
  :clause-order @[0, 1]
  :head (NotSiblingInsert(Ctr1, N1, Ctr2, N2))
  :body (Insert(Ctr1, N1, Ctr2, N2):@[0, 1, 2, 3] ⋈ ~HasNextSibling(Ctr1, N1))
)
)
(stratum 6 simple
  :members @["NextSiblingAnc"]
  (base-variant :name NextSiblingAnc1
  :var-order @["StartCtr", "StartN", "NextCtr", "NextN"]
  :clause-order @[0]
  :head (NextSiblingAnc(StartCtr, StartN, NextCtr, NextN))
  :body (NextSibling(StartCtr, StartN, NextCtr, NextN):@[0, 1, 2, 3])
)
)
(stratum 7 recursive
  :members @["NextSiblingAnc"]
  (recursive-variant :name NextSiblingAnc2
  :delta-at 0
  :var-order @["ParentCtr", "ParentN", "NextCtr", "NextN", "StartCtr", "StartN"]
  :clause-order @[0, 1]
  :head (NextSiblingAnc(StartCtr, StartN, NextCtr, NextN))
  :body (ΔNextSiblingAnc(ParentCtr, ParentN, NextCtr, NextN):@[0, 1, 2, 3] ⋈ NotSiblingInsert(StartCtr, StartN, ParentCtr, ParentN):@[2, 3, 0, 1])
)
)
(stratum 8 simple
  :members @["HasChild"]
  (base-variant :name HasChild
  :var-order @["_gen3", "_gen4", "ParentCtr", "ParentN"]
  :clause-order @[0]
  :head (HasChild(ParentCtr, ParentN))
  :body (Insert(_gen3, _gen4, ParentCtr, ParentN):@[0, 1, 2, 3])
)
)
(stratum 9 simple
  :members @["Assign", "NextElem"]
  (base-variant :name NextElem1
  :var-order @["PrevCtr", "PrevN", "NextCtr", "NextN"]
  :clause-order @[0]
  :head (NextElem(PrevCtr, PrevN, NextCtr, NextN))
  :body (FirstChild(PrevCtr, PrevN, NextCtr, NextN):@[0, 1, 2, 3])
)
  (base-variant :name NextElem2
  :var-order @["PrevCtr", "PrevN", "NextCtr", "NextN"]
  :clause-order @[0, 1]
  :head (NextElem(PrevCtr, PrevN, NextCtr, NextN))
  :body (NextSiblingAnc(PrevCtr, PrevN, NextCtr, NextN):@[0, 1, 2, 3] ⋈ ~HasChild(PrevCtr, PrevN))
)
  (base-variant :name Assign
  :var-order @["ctr", "n", "_gen5", "_gen6"]
  :clause-order @[0]
  :head (Assign(ctr, n, ctr, n, n))
  :body (Insert(ctr, n, _gen5, _gen6):@[0, 1, 2, 3])
)
)
(stratum 10 simple
  :members @["CurrentValue"]
  (base-variant :name CurrentValue
  :var-order @["IDCtr", "IDN", "ElemCtr", "ElemN", "Value"]
  :clause-order @[0, 1]
  :head (CurrentValue(ElemCtr, ElemN, Value))
  :body (Assign(IDCtr, IDN, ElemCtr, ElemN, Value):@[0, 1, 2, 3, 4] ⋈ ~Remove(IDCtr, IDN))
)
)
(stratum 11 simple
  :members @["HasValue"]
  (base-variant :name HasValue
  :var-order @["ElemCtr", "ElemN", "_gen7"]
  :clause-order @[0]
  :head (HasValue(ElemCtr, ElemN))
  :body (CurrentValue(ElemCtr, ElemN, _gen7):@[0, 1, 2])
)
)
(stratum 12 simple
  :members @["NotHasValueNextElem"]
  (base-variant :name NotHasValueNextElem
  :var-order @["Ctr1", "N1", "Ctr2", "N2"]
  :clause-order @[0, 1]
  :head (NotHasValueNextElem(Ctr1, N1, Ctr2, N2))
  :body (NextElem(Ctr1, N1, Ctr2, N2):@[0, 1, 2, 3] ⋈ ~HasValue(Ctr2, N2))
)
)
(stratum 13 simple
  :members @["SkipBlank"]
  (base-variant :name SkipBlank1
  :var-order @["FromCtr", "FromN", "ToCtr", "ToN"]
  :clause-order @[0]
  :head (SkipBlank(FromCtr, FromN, ToCtr, ToN))
  :body (NextElem(FromCtr, FromN, ToCtr, ToN):@[0, 1, 2, 3])
)
)
(stratum 14 recursive
  :members @["SkipBlank"]
  (recursive-variant :name SkipBlank2
  :delta-at 0
  :var-order @["ViaCtr", "ViaN", "ToCtr", "ToN", "FromCtr", "FromN"]
  :clause-order @[0, 1]
  :head (SkipBlank(FromCtr, FromN, ToCtr, ToN))
  :body (ΔSkipBlank(ViaCtr, ViaN, ToCtr, ToN):@[0, 1, 2, 3] ⋈ NotHasValueNextElem(FromCtr, FromN, ViaCtr, ViaN):@[2, 3, 0, 1])
)
)
(stratum 15 simple
  :members @["NextVisible"]
  (base-variant :name NextVisible1
  :var-order @["PrevCtr", "PrevN", "NextCtr", "NextN"]
  :clause-order @[0, 1, 2]
  :head (NextVisible(PrevCtr, PrevN, NextCtr, NextN))
  :body (HasValue(PrevCtr, PrevN):@[0, 1] ⋈ SkipBlank(PrevCtr, PrevN, NextCtr, NextN):@[0, 1, 2, 3] ⋈ HasValue(NextCtr, NextN):@[0, 1])
)
  (base-variant :name NextVisible2
  :var-order @["PrevCtr", "PrevN", "NextCtr", "NextN"]
  :clause-order @[0, 1, 2]
  :head (NextVisible(PrevCtr, PrevN, NextCtr, NextN))
  :body (HasValue(PrevCtr, PrevN):@[0, 1] ⋈ SkipBlank(PrevCtr, PrevN, NextCtr, NextN):@[0, 1, 2, 3] ⋈ HasValue(NextCtr, NextN):@[0, 1])
)
)
(stratum 16 simple
  :members @["Result"]
  (base-variant :name Result
  :var-order @["ctr2", "N2", "ctr1", "_gen8", "value"]
  :clause-order @[0, 1]
  :head (Result(ctr1, ctr2, value))
  :body (NextVisible(ctr1, _gen8, ctr2, N2):@[2, 3, 0, 1] ⋈ CurrentValue(ctr2, N2, value):@[0, 1, 2])
)
)
)
